scripts.migrate:status: node -e "const path=require('path'); require('dotenv').config({path:path.join(process.cwd(),'..','.env')}); require('dotenv').config({path:path.join(process.cwd(),'.env')}); const mysql=require('mysql2/promise'); (async()=>{const conn=await mysql.createConnection({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number(process.env.DB_PORT||3306),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'julie_cosmetics'}); const [rows]=await conn.query('SELECT version, applied_at FROM schema_migrations ORDER BY id'); rows.forEach((row)=>console.log(row.version,'@',row.applied_at)); await conn.end();})().catch((error)=>{console.error(error.message); process.exit(1);});"
